div1.entryFree:
Union, 1) junction (especially by marriage): the true concord of well-tuned sounds by --s married, Sonn. 8, 6. the u. of your bed, Tp. IV, 21. an u. in partition, Mids. III, 2, 210. this u. shall do more than battery can, John II, 446.
2) a fine pearl: in the cap an u. shall he throw, Hml. V, 2, 283 (Qq unice or onyx). Hml. V, 2, 283
